title: Peruvian-Style Chicken and Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish inspired by Peruvian cuisine, featuring chicken, turmeric, and fresh herbs.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Peruvian pilaf mix and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in the chopped cilantro, ground turmeric, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked chicken breast back into the skillet and stir to combine.
Squeeze the fresh lime juice over the top and serve hot.
Cook the rice according to package instructions.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and serve alongside the chicken and rice pilaf.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
